messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0145",
  "title": "2025 GLOBAL MOBILE GAME MARKETING TREND INSIGHTS 2025年手游热门广告主营销洞察 07",
  "page_index": 85,
  "page_range": "85-86"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0146",
    "title": "广告主投放数据",
    "page_range": "86",
    "summary": "This section provides advertising campaign and commercial performance data for the mobile game *MapleStory: Idle RPG*. It supports retrieval for the following:\n\n- **Topics:** Mobile game ad campaign tracking, idle RPG market performance, publisher launch strategies, short-term monetization benchmarks.\n- **Entities:** *MapleStory: Idle RPG* (game title), NEXON (publisher/developer), Southeast Asia (initial launch market).\n- **Dates:** May 2025 (first ad campaign/launch), 2025 (ranking reference year), 45-day performance measurement window.\n- **Metrics:** 38,700 cross-platform deduplicated ad creatives; >$100M revenue within 45 days; 3M total downloads; #1 global sales rank among new idle RPGs in 2025.\n- **Claims & Evidence:** Claims rapid commercial success and top-tier market positioning for a newly launched idle RPG; evidenced by short-term revenue figures, download volume, and official sales rankings.\n- **Definitions/Procedures/Tables/Figures:** None explicitly defined or referenced; presented as a standalone quantitative snapshot/case study.\n- **Answerable Questions:** When was the first ad campaign for *MapleStory: Idle RPG* launched? What was the total volume of deduplicated ad creatives? Which market did NEXON target first? What were the revenue, download, and ranking metrics within the first 45 days? How did the game rank globally among new idle RPGs in 2025?"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0147",
    "title": "热门新品 RPG手游营销观察",
    "page_range": "86-87",
    "summary": "This section delivers a 2025 marketing and advertising intelligence analysis for trending new mobile games, leveraging data from the 广大大 (GuangdaDa) Advertiser Analysis Module. It covers four primary entities: *MapleStory: Idle RPG*, *Mahjong Wonders* (麻将连连看), *Gossip Harbor*, and *Kingshot*. The analysis spans multiple 2025 data windows (January–December, February–December, May–December, and July–December), with initial ad campaigns launching between February and July 2025 (noting an earlier June 2022 ad deployment for *Mahjong Wonders*). Key metrics include cumulative deduplicated creatives (39K–137K), estimated impressions (1.25M), popularity/heat scores, audience demographics (e.g., 68% female, 45+ age skew for *Mahjong Wonders*), and ad format distributions where video consistently dominates (79.5%–94.8%). The section defines \"high-quality active creatives\" as assets generating high new impressions or elevated popularity during the tracking period. A consistent interactive procedure is outlined: users can click image thumbnails to play full creative videos. Notable claims identify *Mahjong Wonders* as the strongest 2025 dark horse in the Mahjong match-3 genre and caution that AI-generated cartoon characters in *MapleStory: Idle RPG* previews may contain inaccuracies. Evidence is sourced from third-party ad intelligence analytics and presented through demographic charts, ad format ratio breakdowns, dual-platform deployment timelines (iOS/Android), and interactive clickable ad previews. No tables are visible in this section."
  }
]

message.content:
This section (Pages 85–86) delivers 2025 global mobile game marketing trend insights and advertiser performance analysis, focusing on campaign tracking, launch strategies, and short-term monetization benchmarks for trending new titles.

- **Topics:** Mobile game ad campaign tracking, idle RPG market performance, publisher launch strategies, short-term monetization benchmarks, and 2025 marketing intelligence for trending new mobile games.
- **Entities:** *MapleStory: Idle RPG*, NEXON (publisher/developer), Southeast Asia (initial launch market), *Mahjong Wonders* (麻将连连看), *Gossip Harbor*, *Kingshot*, and the 广大大 (GuangdaDa) Advertiser Analysis Module.
- **Dates:** May 2025 (initial ad campaign/launch for *MapleStory: Idle RPG*); February–July 2025 (initial ad campaigns for tracked titles); June 2022 (earlier ad deployment for *Mahjong Wonders*); 2025 (primary ranking/reference year); 45-day performance measurement window; multiple 2025 tracking windows (Jan–Dec, Feb–Dec, May–Dec, Jul–Dec).
- **Metrics:** 38,700 cross-platform deduplicated ad creatives (*MapleStory*); >$100M revenue within 45 days; 3M total downloads; #1 global sales rank among new idle RPGs in 2025; cumulative deduplicated creatives across titles (39K–137K); estimated impressions (1.25M); audience demographics (e.g., 68% female, 45+ age skew for *Mahjong Wonders*); ad format distribution with video dominance (79.5%–94.8%).
- **Definitions:** "High-quality active creatives" are defined as ad assets generating high new impressions or elevated popularity/heat scores during the tracking period.
- **Procedures:** Interactive procedure allows users to click image thumbnails to play full creative videos.
- **Claims:** *MapleStory: Idle RPG* achieved rapid commercial success and top-tier market positioning; *Mahjong Wonders* is identified as the strongest 2025 dark horse in the Mahjong match-3 genre; AI-generated cartoon characters in *MapleStory: Idle RPG* previews may contain inaccuracies.
- **Evidence Types:** Third-party ad intelligence analytics (GuangdaDa), short-term revenue/download figures, official sales rankings, demographic charts, ad format ratio breakdowns, dual-platform (iOS/Android) deployment timelines, and interactive clickable ad previews.
- **Tables/Figures:** No tables are visible; data is presented through quantitative snapshots, demographic charts, format breakdowns, deployment timelines, and interactive ad previews.
